findings.evidence: Mathlib has `structure HomotopyWith ... (P : C(X, Y) → Prop)` at `mathlib/Mathlib/Topology/Homotopy/Basic.lean:384`, `def HomotopicWith` at line 511, and generic `refl`/`symm`/`trans` at lines 518, 522, and 530; this PR redefines `structure Isotopy` at line 51, `def Isotopic := Nonempty ...` at line 102, and re-proves `refl`/`symm` at lines 113 and 119.
findings.fix: Define the slice-embedding isotopy as an abbrev/alias of `HomotopyWith f₀ f₁ (fun g => IsEmbedding g)` and `HomotopicWith`, or rename this stronger total-map notion and add explicit bridge lemmas to the existing API.
findings.issue: `Isotopy`/`Isotopic` duplicate the existing `ContinuousMap.HomotopyWith`/`HomotopicWith` pattern for homotopies whose time-slices satisfy `IsEmbedding`, so users lose the existing generic `refl`, `symm`, and `trans` API and get a parallel relation.

summary: The PR introduces a parallel isotopy API instead of building on Mathlib's generic homotopy-with-property API, despite targeting embedding-preserving homotopies. This should be reconciled before the new relation becomes downstream surface area.
